name: io.github.chrischall/signupgenius-mcp
description: SignUpGenius for Claude — sign-ups, slot reports, and groups. Free accounts or Pro API key.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNUPGENIUS_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: SignUpGenius login email (recommended). Pair with SIGNUPGENIUS_PASSWORD for session mode — works on free accounts. No SSO/2FA.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNUPGENIUS_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: SignUpGenius password (recommended) — required iff SIGNUPGENIUS_EMAIL is set.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNUPGENIUS_USER_KEY
environmentVariables.description: SignUpGenius Pro API key (Pro Tools > API Management). Required only for slot REPORTS — Pro subscription needed.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNUPGENIUS_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Friendly account name used in startup logs.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNUPGENIUS_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the default JSON API base (v2/k for key mode, v3 for session mode).

environmentVariables.name: SIGNUPGENIUS_LEGACY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Session mode only: override the host for legacy /SUGboxAPI.cfm calls. Defaults to https://www.signupgenius.com.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNUPGENIUS_LOGIN_URL
environmentVariables.description: Session mode only: override the login-form host. Defaults to https://www.signupgenius.com.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNUPGENIUS_DISABLE_FETCHPROXY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to skip the fetchproxy browser-extension fallback (missing creds become a hard error — useful in headless CI).
